items: Enable file upload UI features using the update_app_features system tool before implementing backend handlers to ensure frontend-backend parity
Separate document-based generation logic into dedicated service functions distinct from topic-based generation to handle different input modalities cleanly
Store LLM prompt templates in a dedicated prompts.py file using distinct constants for different generation modes like DOCUMENT_BASED_GENERATION_PROMPT
Detect uploaded files in chat handlers and route to document parsing logic that extracts structured content for automated presentation generation
Maintain clean architecture by keeping FastAPI route handlers in main.py lean and delegating all business logic to service.py functions
